changes: — sync.py v3.79 - Feel/RPE fix + report template updates (2026-03-11) —
Feel removed from daily history rows — it's an activity-level field, not wellness. Was incorrectly flattened to a daily scalar.
RPE added to weekly history tier (avg_rpe, rpe_count). Feel aggregation retained with correct activity-level sourcing (avg_feel, feel_count).
Null safety fix: feel collection uses `is not None` (feel=0 would have been silently dropped).
Report templates: feel/RPE added to post-workout (per-session), pre-workout (last session feel), weekly (avg + count), block (avg + prev block comparison).
Report examples updated to demonstrate feel/RPE presence and omit-if-null pattern.
— sync.py v3.78 - Week alignment, log rotation, update checker (2026-03-10) —
Weekly history tier (_build_weekly_tier) respects configured week_start_day — was hardcoded to Monday.
SKILL.md moved to repo root. HEARTBEAT_TEMPLATE.md moved to examples/agentic/openclaw/. Old openclaw/ folder removed. .gitignore added.
Terminology: 'workspace' → 'data directory' across SKILL.md, SETUP_ASSISTANT.md, DOSSIER_TEMPLATE.md, HEARTBEAT_TEMPLATE.md.
DOSSIER_TEMPLATE.md: added optional Data Path field for split-workspace setups.
Update checker: removed manifest.json fallback from _check_for_updates(), changelog.json only.
Log rotation: sync.log trimmed to 200 lines when over 1MB.
Upgrade: replace your sync.py with the latest from github.com/CrankAddict/section-11/tree/main/examples/sync.py
